title: Intent Classification Pipeline
description: Mermaid flowchart of the complete intent-classification pipeline, from user query through preprocessing and feature extraction to a classifier and confidence-scored prediction.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

learningObjectives: Trace a user query through preprocessing, feature extraction, and classification
Explain how a confidence threshold decides between acting and escalating
educational.prerequisites: Basic understanding of tokenization and machine-learning classifiers
